examples: Two workers put the finishing touches on a monument to the Spanish peseta in southern Spain.
The Peseta, Franc, Drachmar etc have been phased out, Euros is now the currency of most major European countries.
The existence of the euro means that there are no George Soros-type speculators able to organise runs on the lira, peseta or drachma.
Many Spaniards fear tighter financial controls when the euro replaces the peseta as the currency here.
It has no currency of its own and has traditionally used the franc and the peseta.
